name: akoya_request-ai-extensions
_comment: AI workflow-chaining + Grant Report (Field Set B) extensions on akoya_request. Catalogued in docs/INTAKE_PORTAL_SCHEMA_CHANGES.md (2026-05-07 entries). Field naming follows the v3 spec rule: wmkf_ai_<concept> with no underscore between concept words (so wmkf_ai_riskflags, NOT wmkf_ai_risk_flags). Multi-line text + JSON payloads use Memo; single-line strings use String.

attributes.description: JSON array of extracted keywords from the proposal. Workflow-chaining input for downstream prompts (PD assignment, reviewer matching) so they don't re-parse the full narrative.
JSON array of identified research methodologies. Workflow-chaining input for compliance + reviewer matching.
JSON array of compliance/risk flags surfaced during initial extraction (e.g. dual-use research, human subjects, animal models). Reviewed by staff; not action-by-itself.
JSON object summarizing the proposal team (PI, co-PIs, key personnel, affiliations). Cached so reviewer-matching prompts don't have to re-parse the proposal.
Multi-line narrative summary of the proposed budget (totals, allocation, equipment, personnel). Human-readable; downstream prompts may quote.
Multi-line narrative summary of the proposal timeline (phases, milestones, dependencies).
Grant final report: number of postdocs supported. Field Set B (extracted by report-extraction prompt; logged via wmkf_ai_run with wmkf_ai_tasktype = Report).
Grant final report: number of graduate students supported.
Grant final report: number of undergraduates supported.
Grant final report: total publications resulting from the grant.
Grant final report: peer-reviewed subset of total publications.
Grant final report: non-peer-reviewed subset of total publications.
Grant final report: number of patents awarded.
Grant final report: number of patents submitted (filed but not yet awarded).
Grant final report: narrative summary of additional funding the team obtained during the grant period (often as a result of the Keck-funded work).
Grant final report: narrative summary of project impacts.
Grant final report: narrative summary of awards and honors received during the grant period.
Grant final report: narrative summary of broader implications and follow-on directions.
Grant final report: high-level outcome summary for board / staff readout.

Grant final report: per-goal assessment as a JSON payload. Documented exception to the 'flat fields preferred' convention — full per-goal breakdown is too irregular across grants to flatten cleanly. Schema is stable across runs of the same prompt; consumers parse JSON.
Grant final report: free-form notes for foundation staff (questions, concerns, follow-up flags).
Grant final report: citation for the most-significant publication (flat per Connor 2026-05-07; not a JSON list).
Grant final report: abstract for the most-significant publication.
Grant final report: source attribution for publication 1 (e.g. 'PubMed PMID:12345', 'arXiv:2401.12345', 'self-reported').
Grant final report: citation for the second-most-significant publication.
Grant final report: abstract for the second-most-significant publication.
Grant final report: source attribution for publication 2.
Grant final report: overall rating of grant outcomes. Connor 2026-05-07: starting choice set; full rating mechanism not yet spec'd, expect iteration.
